subject: Towering many-limbed monster with a long sinuous neck and a fanged, glowing-eyed head looming over a panicked figure ensnared in a thicket of writhing tendrils
description: A massive teal-and-green nightmare creature dominates the frame: a serpentine neck rises to a skeletal, fanged head with twin glowing white pupils, while dozens of branching rubbery limbs and clawed tendrils splay outward like a writhing forest. Below the monster, a terrified figure in a black jacket and yellow shirt stands frozen mid-flight, mouth open in a scream, surrounded on all sides by coiling appendages. The setting suggests an industrial or skeletal interior space with vertical structural beams visible in the background, all washed in eerie blue-green moonlit tones. Lighting is dramatic and chiaroscuro, with the figure spotlit from above against the looming silhouette of the creature.
foreground: Terrified human survivor in casual modern clothing, surrounded by reaching tendrils and claws
background: Looming long-necked tendril-monster with glowing eyes inside a dim industrial or skeletal structure
emotion: raw terror, open-mouthed scream, body braced as if mid-flight
